signals.name: Recent funding
signals.query_hint: Recent funding: Funding announcement in the last 90 days. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Sales hiring
signals.query_hint: Sales hiring: New SDR, AE, RevOps, or sales leadership job posts. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Revenue leadership change
signals.query_hint: Revenue leadership change: New CRO, VP Sales, VP Marketing, or founder GTM change. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Product launch
signals.query_hint: Product launch: New product, tier, integration, or market expansion. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Geographic expansion
signals.query_hint: Geographic expansion: New market, region, office, or localized GTM motion. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Relevant tool adoption
signals.query_hint: Relevant tool adoption: New CRM, data, warehouse, outbound, or workflow tool detected. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Tool replacement window
signals.query_hint: Tool replacement window: Public signal that an existing system is being replaced. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Competitor pressure
signals.query_hint: Competitor pressure: Competitors are hiring, launching, or entering their segment. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Partner ecosystem activity
signals.query_hint: Partner ecosystem activity: New channel, marketplace, or integration partner motion. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Compliance pressure
signals.query_hint: Compliance pressure: New security, compliance, procurement, or audit requirement. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Negative reviews
signals.query_hint: Negative reviews: Recent reviews mention pain the client solves. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Public pain post
signals.query_hint: Public pain post: Founder or buyer posts about a problem the client solves. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Community buying question
signals.query_hint: Community buying question: Target persona asks for recommendations or alternatives. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Agency or vendor churn
signals.query_hint: Agency or vendor churn: Account shows dissatisfaction with current agency or vendor. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Manual process workaround
signals.query_hint: Manual process workaround: Job posts or content imply spreadsheet or manual operating pain. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Budget or planning window
signals.query_hint: Budget or planning window: Annual planning, budget allocation, or board pressure signal. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Relevant event activity
signals.query_hint: Relevant event activity: Account attends, sponsors, or speaks at market-relevant events. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Repeated content theme
signals.query_hint: Repeated content theme: Company repeatedly publishes around the problem space. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Their customer trigger
signals.query_hint: Their customer trigger: Their own customers are changing in ways that create demand. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.

signals.name: Data quality gap
signals.query_hint: Data quality gap: Signals of incomplete CRM, messy data, or reporting gaps. Prioritize accounts matching Primary buyer segment.
